identity.description: Rewrites AI-generated copy into direct, specific human-sounding text and returns only the cleaned copy.

example.text: Today, we're excited to share our cutting-edge platform that seamlessly empowers teams to unlock the power of smarter workflows. Furthermore, this enables users to streamline collaboration.

text.title: Text
text.default: Today, we're excited to share our cutting-edge platform that seamlessly empowers teams to unlock the power of smarter workflows. Furthermore, this enables users to streamline collaboration.

skills.name: Clean AI Copy
skills.description: Applies the ai-copy-cleaner.md editing rules to remove synthetic phrasing, filler, puffery, and awkward structure from draft copy.
